data.title: Chainlink predicts $18-20 recovery by December 2025, requires $14.93 breakout for bullish trend.
data.description: Forecasters are anticipating a potential rise in the price of LINK cryptocurrency, aiming for a target of $18.26. Despite facing bearish trends, analysts highlight the importance of breaking through the critical resistance level of $14.93 to sustain a bullish momentum.

data.title: ZTE CDO Cui Li discusses AI at Economist Impact's event in Singapore. ZTE Corp: 0763.HK / 000063.SZ.
data.description: ZTE Corporation, a prominent global provider of integrated information and communication technology solutions, revealed that its Chief Development Officer, Cui Li, discussed at AI Innovation Asia 2025, organized by Economist Impact. ZTE's stock is listed as 0763.HK on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange and 000063.SZ on the Shenzhen Stock Exchange. The event took place in Singapore on December 4, 2025.

data.title: Global automated manual transmission market projected to reach USD 28.6 billion by 2034 at 5.2% CAGR driven by fuel efficiency and ease of driving.
data.description: The global market for automated manual transmission is witnessing significant growth driven by a rise in emphasis on fuel efficiency and reduced emissions, improved ease of driving in congested areas, and an increasing adoption in commercial fleet and taxi services. This trend is particularly evident in WILMINGTON, Del., as of Dec. 4, 2025, as reported by Allied Market Research. The report highlights important numbers reflecting the growing popularity and demand for this technology in the automotive industry.

data.title: JMGO releases N3 4K projector in North America, offering optical zoom, dynamic gimbal, Google TV, and Netflix.
data.description: Bringing together advanced features such as optical zoom, dynamic gimbal, and incorporating Google TV with Netflix pre-installed to provide a unique cinematic experience, JMGO from SHENZHEN, China, revealed the debut of N3 4K in North America on December 4, 2025. As a pioneer in home projection technology, JMGO aims to offer unparalleled audio-visual solutions to consumers worldwide.

data.title: DOT is expected to reach $2.75-$3.30 in 6 weeks following a recent dip below $2.05 support level. Technical analysis indicates a bounce.
data.description: Forecasts for the price of DOT indicate a possible rebound to a range between $2.75 and $3.30 following the breach of the crucial support level at $2.05. Technical signals point to an impending rally due to oversold conditions.

data.title: Salesforce counters AI adoption fears with 70% surge in Agentforce deployments, reaching $1.4 billion in annual portfolio.
data.description: Salesforce Inc. (NYSE: CRM) responded to concerns about stagnant AI adoption with its third-quarter earnings report, refuting claims of customers being stuck in "pilot purgatory." The data presented contradicts recent channel checks and shows a positive trend for CRM stock. Despite warnings of slow uptake and shrinking pipelines from analysts and partners, Salesforce revealed a 70% increase in Agentforce accounts in production compared to the previous quarter. This surge directly challenges the notion that businesses are only experimenting with AI. CEO Marc Benioff emphasized usage statistics to demonstrate the growing influence of the "Agentic Enterprise." The company disclosed that its AI and Data portfolio has nearly reached $1.4 billion in Annual Recurring Revenue. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dow jumps 400+ points as rate cut bets increase. Fear index shifts to 'Fear' zone due to weaker job data and a cooling market.
data.description: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index indicated a slight decrease in fear levels, moving into the "Fear" zone on Wednesday. U.S. stocks saw gains, with the Dow Jones index rising by more than 400 points on Wednesday, fueled by expectations of a rate cut following disappointing private employment data. The ADP report revealed a loss of 32,000 jobs in November, a significant shift from the 42,000 jobs added in October and below the anticipated 5,000 gain. This data emphasized a cooling labor market. The S&P Global services PMI fell to 54.1 in November from the previous month's 54.8, revised down from the initial reading of 55. U.S. industrial production rose by 0.1% in September compared to a revised... Read the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: AVAX price forecast aims for $18.50 recovery in 4 weeks with a 25% upside potential, despite current weakness.
data.description: Predictions for AVAX foresee a potential 25% increase, reaching a target price of $18.50 within the next month. This optimistic outlook is supported by technical indicators indicating a strong bullish momentum, despite the current period of consolidation.

data.title: Solana Mobile set to introduce SKR token linked to Seeker phone in January, with 10 billion tokens in circulation.
data.description: Solana Mobile has announced the forthcoming launch of its SKR token, linked to the Seeker phone, scheduled for early next year. The token will have a total supply of 10 billion tokens.
ECB board member Cipollone says the bank will adhere to G7 communique language on FX when asked about a potential Japanese intervention to support the yen – Nikkei interview.
ECB's Cipollone: We are assuming that the savings rate will go down; if it doesn't materialise, we will need to act.
